data.name: PageTitle
data.value: Control Peso Thiscloud - Smart Weight Tracking

data.name: MetaDescription
data.value: Control Peso Thiscloud is a free web application to record and analyze your body weight. Dashboard with metrics, evolution charts, trend analysis and projections.

data.name: MetaKeywords
data.value: weight control, weight tracking, weight log, weight app, weight chart, weight analysis, BMI, weight trends, body weight

data.name: OgTitle
data.value: Control Peso Thiscloud - Body Weight Tracking

data.name: OgDescription
data.value: Free web application to record and analyze your body weight with dashboard, charts and trend analysis.

data.name: TwitterTitle
data.value: Control Peso Thiscloud - Body Weight Tracking

data.name: TwitterDescription
data.value: Free web application to record and analyze your body weight.

data.name: HeroTitle
data.value: Control Peso Thiscloud

data.name: HeroSubtitle
data.value: Smart body weight tracking with real-time analysis

data.name: GoToDashboardButton
data.value: Go to Dashboard

data.name: GetStartedButton
data.value: Get Started Now

data.name: StatsBadge
data.value: 100% Free · Private · Secure

data.name: FeatureFastRegistrationTitle
data.value: Fast Registration

data.name: FeatureFastRegistrationDescription
data.value: Add your weight in seconds with an intuitive and fluid interface

data.name: FeatureAdvancedAnalysisTitle
data.value: Advanced Analysis

data.name: FeatureAdvancedAnalysisDescription
data.value: Interactive charts and detailed statistics of your evolution

data.name: FeatureMaxPrivacyTitle
data.value: Maximum Privacy

data.name: FeatureMaxPrivacyDescription
data.value: Secure OAuth authentication and end-to-end data encryption

data.name: FeatureAiPredictionsTitle
data.value: AI Predictions

data.name: FeatureAiPredictionsDescription
data.value: Smart projections based on your historical patterns

data.name: FeatureMultiDeviceTitle
data.value: Multi-device

data.name: FeatureMultiDeviceDescription
data.value: Access from any device with automatic synchronization

data.name: FeaturePersonalizedGoalsTitle
data.value: Personalized Goals

data.name: FeaturePersonalizedGoalsDescription
data.value: Set goals and receive real-time progress notifications
